fault_hypothesis: The clamping logic is incorrectly guarded. The condition `if not clamp:` on line 65 should be `if clamp:`, causing clamping to occur when it is disabled and to be skipped when it is enabled.

constraints.intent: The implemented logic is only correct for interpolation (t between 0 and 1), but all failing tests involve extrapolation.
Clamping to the lower bound should only occur when clamping is enabled.
Clamping to the upper bound should only occur when clamping is enabled.

spec.expr: (clamp and (min(y0, y1) <= y__5 <= max(y0, y1))) or ((not clamp) and y__5 == y__1)

constraints.intent: The final value should be clamped if and only if clamp is enabled; otherwise it should be the raw interpolated value.
